appraisal_events.evidence: Elle avait renoncé à faire sa visite chez les M. Verdurin et comptait aller, comme je le lui avais conseillé...; je la remerciai avec exagération... afin qu'une autre fois elle m'obéît de même; elle semblait me pardonner... comme conséquence d'un grand amour.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator frames Albertine as yielding to his wishes (renouncing the Verdurins) and accepting his jealous surveillance, while he openly strategizes to train further obedience. This presents her locally as subordinated in the relationship.

status_effects.explanation: Albertine’s local standing in the relationship is weakened by her compliance with the narrator’s directives and her indulgence of his spying/jealousy.
